rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 21, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT STEPHEN HOM's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to assert his causes of action in the alternative (1) against Stephen Hom, as trustee, of the owner-Trust (of which Katie Hom was the original trustee/co-trustee at the time of the inception of the Lease and the Settlement agreement) and current landlord demanding rent;and/ or (2) Stephen Hom, as personal representative of Katie Hom's estate. All other currently named defendants are not proper and shall not be included in the amended complaint (unless before the amended complaint is filed there is a new trustee or new personal representative). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 21, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT EVELYN HOM's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Based on the judicially noticeable documents, Evelyn Hom is neither a trustee of the owner-Trust nor a personal representative of Katie Hom's estate. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 21, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT STEPHEN HOM's MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the request for punitive damages. No basis for punitive damages is currently alleged. Motion is otherwise denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 21, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT EVELYN HOM's MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JEREMIAH CASEY VS. 1875 MISSION STREET PARTNERS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 21, 2017 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT JEREMIAH CASEY's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT continued to January 16, 2018 per stipulation and order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW LEE VS. ARTHUR & AMPHORN CHAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ; Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 21, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT; Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication continued to January 11, 2018. It appears that the Separate Statement submitted with the moving papers contained a typographical error (Compare Separate Statement with other filings in support of the motion). The error has been clarified. Therefore, the Plaintiff shall have until January 4, 2018 to file an opposition and Defendant shall have until January 8, 2018 to file a reply. For the purposes of the hearing the Court will only consider the moving papers (with the typographical error corrected) and opposition, reply papers filed in accordance with this ruling. Previously filed opposition and reply will not be considered. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARION L STARR VS. AGNES C KOSEL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 21, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT AGNES KOZEL's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to December 27, 2017 per the order of the presiding judge. CCP 170.6 challenge to the honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay on file. = (501/REQ)
